method_summary: The paper presents a comprehensive survey methodology that systematically examines trustworthy agentic AI through two core dimensions (Safety and Robustness, Privacy and System Security), identifying risks across agent workflows, and consolidating evaluation into a unified metrics-and-benchmarks framework.
key_innovation: A unified metrics-and-benchmarks hub that consolidates both outcome and process signals for consistent evaluation and deployment decisions of agentic systems.
title: Towards trustworthy agentic AI: a comprehensive survey of safety, robustness, privacy, and system security
